mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, consecutive_days AS consecutiveDays, DATE_FORMAT(last_login_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS lastLoginDate, total_login_days AS totalLoginDays, claimed_days AS claimedDays FROM continuous_login WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO continuous_login (user_id, consecutive_days, last_login_date, total_login_days, claimed_days) VALUES (#{userId}, #{consecutiveDays}, #{lastLoginDate}, #{totalLoginDays}, #{claimedDays}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE consecutive_days = #{consecutiveDays}, last_login_date = #{lastLoginDate}, total_login_days = #{totalLoginDays}, claimed_days = #{claimedDays}
